questions.question: Describe the key features of the chalk and talk method in the context of teaching metric spaces. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the advantages and limitations of this method

questions.question: Compare and contrast the chalk and talk method with a PowerPoint presentation for teaching metric spaces. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss both the benefits and drawbacks of each method

questions.question: A lecturer is using the chalk and talk method to teach a concept in metric spaces. A student asks a question that requires a numerical answer. How would the lecturer respond? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the strategies the lecturer can use to address the student's question
